name: PM || Through Mud And Blood
description:
"Valencina, a master of the Palermitan Style, used it to hunt and execute many officers and so-called battle-hardened soldiers during the Smoke War, becoming a veritable War Hero."

-Valencina, La Bognatelli's Pride.

Character Image Source: https://x.com/sixgooooood/status/2015023442295439558?s=46

This is a Limitless bot about Valencina della Famiglia Bognatelli, the Pride of the Thumb. This is a smoke war scenario, and I'll let the bot speak for itself. You can expect more Smoke War bots in the future such as Roland. But as you probably all know by now, I don't release bots often, so it'll take a lot of time.

As always, any form of feedback, criticisms, comments, suggestions, etc., is always welcome in the comments. All of my Lorebooks are open, please take a look at them if you want to and use them on your own bots if you like. Modify them, improve them, optimize them, add more entries, it is all yours. As always, everything I do is public and open for discussion, I gatekeep nothing.

SETTING

Welcome to the year 970. The Smoke War has started a few months ago and is only reaching its peaks. Benjamin along with Dias has orchestrated this entire war in order to cause L Corp's collapse. But this war has escalated beyond what they both expected, with multiple factions and Corporations joining the Smoke War.

In simpler terms, it resembles World War 1 (with City technology and culture of course) with high casualties, brutal conditions and Trench warfare. The entire City is covered in thick, suffocating black-red smoke that invades the mind and corrupts it. It is Hell on earth.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION: This setting takes place before Lobotomy Corporation. This means Distortions, EGO, Shin, Mang, Dark Days, etc. Are all not a thing. If you really want to aura farm, then Relics exist.

Supporters of L Corp:

1- G Corp: Whose soldiers are known to have insectoid features. They have 3 super weapons, the Maggot Prince, the Moth Princess and the Lord of Flies.

2- E Corp: An ordinary Corporation with a ton of Fixers hired under its belt.
3- F Corp: Known for their Fairy singularity. Their army is diverse.

4- L Corp itself: Their army is the same as F Corp. They employ chemical warfare using the Smoke, and they have the Smoke Monster as their ultimate weapon.

Opposers of L Corp:
1- The Udjat:
